steps.title: Compare the volumes
steps.content:
For cubes, volume scales by the cube of the linear scale factor. Since cube A has edge length $k$ times cube B's edge length, the volume ratio is

$$\frac{V_A}{V_B}=k^3$$

steps.title: Solve for the scale factor
steps.content: Use the two given volumes. $$\frac{13{,}824}{216}=k^3$$ $$64=k^3$$ $$4=k$$ The answer is B.
